mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in retail sales signals firm household demand and near-term revenue support for index constituents, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when measured as an always-on trend signal.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest available value was 473808 as of one month before 2017-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations or has Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate increases the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days after a policy-rate upshift.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 0.91 as of one month before 2017-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or if average triggered returns exceed the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing below a low threshold signals late-cycle labor tightness and rising margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest available value was 4.3 as of one month before 2017-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-below-4.5% triggers deliver nonnegative 60-day average excess returns relative to baseline or if the hit rate for negative returns is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production and retail sales both rise over 3 months, output and end demand are aligned, reducing recession-risk premia and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest available value was 105.0284 as of one month before 2017-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if joint positive INDPRO and RSAFS triggers fail to outperform periods where only one of the two is positive by at least 25 basis points over 20 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction-linked earnings pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest available value was 1172 as of two months before 2017-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST decline triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations or if triggered mean returns are above unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer prices accelerate while the federal funds rate is rising, inflation pressure and tighter policy jointly compress valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds its prior 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest available value was 243.846 as of one month before 2017-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL acceleration and FEDFUNDS increase trigger has a 20-day average return that is not lower than either single-condition trigger alone.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth together with a falling unemployment rate signals broad income growth that supports consumption and earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 3 months and UNRATE falls over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest available value was 146135 as of one month before 2017-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down triggers produce a 5-day hit rate for positive returns below 52% or a mean return below the unconditional 5-day mean.

mechanism_narrative: A positive industrial production trend signals improving factory output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days as an always-on activity signal.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest available value was 105.0284 as of one month before 2017-06-15
failure_condition: Reject if higher 6-month INDPRO growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 60-day S&P 500 returns across walk-forward windows or if top-quartile INDPRO growth underperforms bottom-quartile growth.
